codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking defect: computeBaselinesOnDemand now resolves preferred sources per metric, selects `source` from health_data_daily, and filters non-preferred rows before baseline aggregation. Added multi-source unit tests verify preferred-source filtering, no-resolution fallback, single-source preservation, per-metric mixed-source handling, and insufficient-data behavior after filtering.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill requires TDD (write failing tests before implementation), but this fix session updated implementation code before adding new tests while still marking `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows edits to `src/lib/dashboard/baselines.ts` before adding the new multi-source test block in `src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/baselines.test.ts`; initial test run was on pre-existing tests only.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton and both diffs (original failed feature and fix). The fix adequately resolves the source-resolution baseline bug identified in the prior review and includes targeted regression coverage.
